description.ko: 질서 속의 혼돈을 표현한 작품으로, 기하학적인 흑요석 구체가 계산된 디지털 파편과 글리치 아티팩트의 폭풍 속으로 해체되는 모습을 담고 있습니다.
description.en: A representation of chaos within order, featuring a geometric obsidian sphere disintegrating into a calculated storm of digital fragments and glitch artifacts.

prompt: A brutalist digital sculpture by KURO-X, titled 'The Algorithmic Fracture.' A massive #1A1A1A obsidian sphere captured mid-detonation, shattering into a precision vortex of #808080 and #C0C0C0 razor-sharp polygonal shards. The scene is set against a clinical #FFFFFF void, intersected by heavy digital glitch artifacts, pixel sorting layers, and extreme RGB chromatic aberration. High-contrast cinematic lighting with razor-sharp ray-traced reflections on shifting obsidian planes. Unreal Engine 5 aesthetic, 8k resolution, capturing the mathematical elegance of digital corruption.
